Category: Equities, Stock Picking, Reversal, Arbitrage, Short Selling, Alternative Data
Strategy Description: Exploits inefficiencies in publicly listed soccer club stocks where investors systematically overvalue teams before important matches due to sentiment bias.
Core Logic: Investors are overly optimistic about match outcomes. Bookmaker odds are compiled by experts and are more efficient, while equity prices reflect biased investor sentiment.
Entry Conditions: Sell short stocks of soccer clubs playing UEFA Championship or other important matches at the end of the business day before the match.
Exit Conditions: Hold the short position for one day and close after the match.
Risk Management Rules: Short-selling strategy acts as a natural hedge to the equity market factor during bear markets.
Market Regime Suitability: Suitable as a hedge/diversification during bear markets.
Full Notes: Performance is estimated based on approximately 40 match days per year. Actual number of liquid stocks may vary.
Mathematical/Statistical Concepts: Sentiment analysis, probability distribution bias, prediction markets, abnormal returns.
